last_completed.summary: Per-target launcher loop harness: launcher/launcher.go generates self-contained main.go (stdlib + target pkg), BuildLauncher compiles with overlay and caches binary at workspace/binaries; LauncherSession tracks InvocationsDispatched; harness.Request extended with Plan field; integration test verifies 5 plans × 10 inputs = 50 invocations, 1 build, 1 binary invocation

next_action: Create the next task branch from the rebased expedition base branch.
